request_payload.exposure_text: As we strengthen our domestic security, we must acknowledge the gaps in our surveillance systems that foreign actors exploit daily. Recent incidents show how critical it is to empower our agencies to act decisively. Those who oppose these measures often underestimate the real threats we face. It's our duty to ensure public safety, even if it means temporary adjustments to our liberties. #NationalSecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
